generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/dtf#
prefix base: http://example.org/base#

instance InnerBoxTempSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 high‑precision 1‑Wire temperature sensor mounted inside the incubator box measuring inner temperature.",
    DTDFVocab:producedData BoxTempSignal1
]

instance InnerBoxTempSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 high‑precision 1‑Wire temperature sensor mounted inside the incubator box measuring inner temperature.",
    DTDFVocab:producedData BoxTempSignal2
]

instance RoomTempSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1‑Wire temperature sensor measuring ambient room temperature.",
    DTDFVocab:producedData RoomTempSignal
]

instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed controlled via MOSFET/optocoupler board, energy supplied from Raspberry Pi 4."
]

instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "12 V or 24 V DC motor fan driven through MOSFETs, controlled by Raspberry Pi 4."
]

instance BoxTempSignal1 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InnerBoxTempSensor1
]

instance BoxTempSignal2 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InnerBoxTempSensor2
]

instance RoomTempSignal : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RoomTempSensor
]

instance HeatbedStatusSignal : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HeatbedActuator
]

instance FanStatusSignal : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom FanActuator
]

instance CalibrateModelAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger model re‑calibration using updated temperature data.",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetReferenceTempAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust reference setpoint for temperature control.",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TroubleshootHardwareAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Guide operator to troubleshoot defective heatbed or fan hardware.",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance CalibratedModelParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated parameter sets for temperature models obtained after model fitting."
]

instance TemperatureTrendForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecast of future temperature trend based on real‑time measurements."
]

instance SafetyViolationAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert triggered when temperature exceeds predefined safety limits."
]

instance ModelATrendInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature trend from ModelA simulation."
]

instance ModelBTrendInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature trend from ModelB simulation."
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of abnormal actuator behavior indicating potential hardware faults."
]

instance RealTimeTempMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service delivering real‑time temperature monitoring and actuation control to operators.",
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureTrendForecastInsight, SetReferenceTempAction
]

instance ModelADynamicSimService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service running dynamic simulation of ModelA to predict future box temperatures.",
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelATrendInsight
]

instance ModelBDynamicSimService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service running dynamic simulation of ModelB to predict future box temperatures.",
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelBTrendInsight
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service performing non‑linear least square calibration of temperature models.",
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibratedModelParametersInsight, CalibrateModelAction
]

instance SafetyMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service monitoring temperature thresholds to detect safety violations.",
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationAlertInsight, TroubleshootHardwareAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service detecting hardware faults in heaters and fans.",
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Local RabbitMQ AMQP broker running on Raspberry Pi 4 for message publishing and subscription.",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeTempMonitoringService, CalibrationService, SafetyMonitoringService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance SciPyOptimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python SciPy library for non‑linear least‑square calibration of DT models.",
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python controller and driver software from the GitHub repository managing heatbed and fan actuators.",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeTempMonitoringService
]

instance BoxTempData1 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped temperature reading from InnerBoxTempSensor1 for DT logging.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker,
    DTDFVocab:fromData BoxTempSignal1
]

instance BoxTempData2 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped temperature reading from InnerBoxTempSensor2 for DT logging.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker,
    DTDFVocab:fromData BoxTempSignal2
]

instance RoomTempData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped room temperature reading for DT logging.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker,
    DTDFVocab:fromData RoomTempSignal
]

instance HeatbedActuatorLog : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Log of heatbed ON/OFF status changes for calibration and fault detection.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker,
    DTDFVocab:fromData HeatbedStatusSignal
]

instance FanActuatorLog : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Log of fan ON/OFF status changes for calibration and fault detection.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker,
    DTDFVocab:fromData FanStatusSignal
]

instance CalibrationParameterData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Set of free parameters obtained from non‑linear least square calibration of temperature models.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SciPyOptimizer,
    DTDFVocab:fromData BoxTempData1,
    DTDFVocab:fromData BoxTempData2,
    DTDFVocab:fromData RoomTempData
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic temperature model A with free parameters calibrated via non‑linear least squares.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SciPyOptimizer
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic temperature model B with free parameters calibrated via non‑linear least squares.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SciPyOptimizer
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT consumes control commands from RabbitMQ and forwards them to the Raspberry Pi controller, which actuates the heatbed and fan through MOSFETs; the DT also publishes actuator state notifications back to the broker."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates in near real‑time, with sensor readings and control commands exchanged over RabbitMQ, allowing millisecond‑to‑second level synchronization between PT and DT."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The constellation consists of the physical incubator, the Raspberry Pi controller, the low‑level driver, the RabbitMQ broker, the virtual simulation models, and the data calibration and monitoring services, all orchestrated through message queue communication."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is in the operational stage, modeling the manufactured incubator for run‑time monitoring and optimization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model validity is assessed by comparing simulated temperature trajectories with experimental data, using residual minimisation via least squares, and validating key assumptions such as uniform temperature distribution and negligible wall heat accumulation; calibration reduces prediction error significantly."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The PT and DT communicate over the AMQP protocol via a local RabbitMQ broker hosted on the Raspberry Pi, with messages exchanged between the low‑level driver, controller, and the virtual models."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed locally on the Raspberry Pi 4, running the RabbitMQ broker and the virtual model processes, all hosted within an open‑source repository and accessible via Wi‑Fi."
]
